prestazioni: Engine: Supercharged 5.0L AJ-V8 Gen III (PT50) with a bespoke Rotrex C38-91 centrifugal supercharger upgrade, increasing boost from 0.68 bar to 1.1 bar, paired with a custom-tuned Bosch MED17.8.1 ECU reflash by Dyno Dynamics UK for 720 hp and 680 lb-ft of torque on 98 RON fuel
Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD in the ZF 8HP95 transmission with a Pankl Racing carbon-fiber driveshaft and a bespoke 4.0:1 final drive ratio conversion by JE Motorsport for improved acceleration

Suspension: Full Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and ride height), paired with Eibach Pro-Race sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro for chassis rigidity
estetica: Body: Full carbon-fiber widebody conversion by Overfinch, featuring extended fender flares (50mm front, 70mm rear) with integrated air curtains, and a custom front splitter with active aerodynamic elements controlled by a Bosch Motorsport ECU

Wheels: Forged 23-inch Rotiform LAS-R wheels in a staggered setup (10.5x23 ET35 front, 12.5x23 ET45 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/35 R23 front, 325/30 R23 rear) and custom center-lock adapters by DPE

Interior: Full Alcantara and carbon-fiber trim by Saddleback Leather, including a bespoke roll cage by Safety Devices UK (FIA-spec, T45 steel), Sparco QRT-K seats with 6-point harnesses, and a Motec C127 dash display integrated into the original infotainment system
